owned_files.notes: 14 modules: shell.js (1388), settings.js (518), wallet.js (1025), pq-identity.js (370), onboarding-tour.js (344), glossary.js (310), accessibility.js (176), icons.js (154), sw.js (129), i18n.js (121), defaults.js (88), eli5.js (67), events.js (54), qrcode.js (2297 vendored)
Stub — minimal shell, defers to resources-app.js (321)

gaps: Web-only with no native counterpart: dashboard, data, dev, download, home, index, ops, projects, roadmap, wallet-guide, web, admin (12 pages)
Native-only with no web counterpart: hud, escape_menu, main_menu (3 in-game UIs — design-correct, not a parity bug)
Modified-but-unstaged on disk per git status: download.html, ops.html, settings-app.js, shell.js, sw.js — pending commit
Thin/stub HTML shells (still functional, work happens in paired *-app.js): crafting (48), resources (59), tools (61), civilization (108)
shell.js has grown to 1388 LOC — candidate for splitting (nav, theme, update-check, keyboard-shortcuts modules)
settings.html + settings-app.js together = ~4200 LOC — biggest single feature surface; matches native settings.rs (1314) but on a much larger scale
summary: 37 web pages, 30277 LOC of HTML + ~7000 LOC of shared shell. Strong on settings/maps/profile/home; 12 pages have no native counterpart (biggest parity gaps: projects, dashboard, ops, admin, dev, data). Five files modified-uncommitted per git status.
